findings.summary: Ferrite bead value "600" parsed as 600 Henries

incorrect.description: L1/L2 are 600-ohm ferrite beads in 0402. LC filter shows resonant_hz=2.97 and henries=600.0. Physically impossible — ferrite beads are rated in ohms at frequency, not henries.

suggestions: Detect ferrite beads by library name or impedance-rated value format. Do not parse bare numeric inductor values as henries when the component is a ferrite bead.

findings.summary: RC filter on LDO enable is soft-start delay, not signal filter

incorrect.description: R3=10k + C39=1u on U2 EN pin detected as RC filter. This is a soft-start delay circuit for an LDO enable pin, not a signal filter.

suggestions: Recognize RC circuits on regulator enable pins as soft-start/delay circuits rather than signal filters

findings.summary: Multi-unit resistor array parts duplicated in components list

incorrect.description: 164 entries in components list vs 135 unique refs. Multi-unit resistor array parts are listed once per unit instead of once per component.

suggestions: Deduplicate multi-unit components in the components list, or clearly mark unit numbers
